name: Peanut Butter Honey Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Washed and drained
Ice Box Cookies
Ice box cookies are a boon for the busy person
because they can be prepared in advance and stored in
the freezer until needed. Just slice and bake when
desired, and you have a great homemade cookie.
If desired, use whole wheat flour and add 1/2 cup
ground peanuts to the dough.
In a large bowl, cream together the shortening and
peanut butter, blending well. Add honey and mix thoroughly.
Gradually blend in brown sugar. Beat in egg and vanilla.
Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda,
and salt. Stir dry ingredients into the creamed mixture.
Stir in raisins if using. Roll out on a floured surface
and chill thoroughly.
Preheat oven to 350°F. Cut chilled dough into thin slices
and bake on greased cookie sheets at 350°F for 10-12 minutes.
Yield: 4-5 dozen.
